ogTitle: Darraweit Guim vs Darriman: Climate Safety

heading: Darraweit Guim vs Darriman — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darraweit Guim, Victoria and Darriman, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Darriman has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Darraweit Guim (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Darraweit Guim or Darriman safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darraweit Guim has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Darriman scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darraweit Guim scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Darriman scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darraweit Guim or Darriman?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Darriman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
